pain_angle: Manual handoffs between WhatsApp, Excel and CAFM
subject: Example Facilities Co.: أين تتراكم غرامات SLA بهدوء عبر المواقع
body:
مرحبًا Operations Director في Example Facilities Co.،

أعمل مع فرق إدارة المرافق والصيانة على مشكلة محددة: Manual handoffs between WhatsApp, Excel and CAFM.
في شركة بحجمكم تظهر غالبًا على شكل: أين تتراكم غرامات SLA بهدوء عبر المواقع.

نبدأ بخطوة صغيرة عبر تدقيق سير عمل AI (التشغيل) (1,500–2,500 SAR): تدقيق تشغيلي أعمق لسير عمل حرج للإيراد مع خطة إصلاح محوكمة وسجل أدلة.
الدليل الذي نشاركه أولًا: Work-order leakage map: a sample audit of 30 anonymized work orders showing SLA risk and unbilled value, with the top 3 governed fixes.

هل يستحق الأمر تشخيص سير عمل بقيادة المؤسس لمدة 20 دقيقة هذا الأسبوع؟

للإيقاف في أي وقت، ردّ بكلمة (إيقاف). ديالكس، الرياض، السعودية.

pain_angle: Variation orders approved late or lost, eroding claimable value
subject: Example Contracting Ltd.: How long a progress claim waits on manual evidence
body:
Hi Projects Director at Example Contracting Ltd.,

I work with contracting & project controls teams on one specific problem: variation orders approved late or lost, eroding claimable value.
For a firm your size that usually shows up as how long a progress claim waits on manual evidence.

We start small with a AI Workflow Audit (Operations) (1,500–2,500 SAR): A deeper operations audit of one revenue-critical workflow with a governed fix plan and evidence trail.
Proof we share first: Variation-order governance map: a redacted review of one project's variations showing approval gaps and at-risk claimable value.

Worth a 20-minute, founder-led workflow diagnostic this week?

Reply STOP to opt out at any time — Dealix, Riyadh, KSA.
cta: Worth a 20-minute, founder-led workflow diagnostic this week?

pain_angle: Document turnaround slowed by repetitive drafting
subject: Example Law Firm: Partner hours lost to intake and conflict admin
body:
Hi Managing Partner at Example Law Firm,

Privacy-first and redacted — no access to your client data, founder-reviewed throughout.
I work with legal & professional services teams on one specific problem: document turnaround slowed by repetitive drafting.
For a firm your size that usually shows up as partner hours lost to intake and conflict admin.

We start small with a Entry Diagnostic / AI Workflow Audit (499–2,500 SAR): A founder-reviewed map of where revenue or operations leak in one core workflow, with the top 3 governed fixes.
Proof we share first: Intake-to-billing governance map: a privacy-first review of a redacted intake/billing sample showing bottlenecks and an audit-ready fix plan.

Worth a 20-minute, founder-led workflow diagnostic this week?

Reply STOP to opt out at any time — Dealix, Riyadh, KSA.
